name: HOMATSU HYO NO JUTSU (BUBBLE DRIFT TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Suiton)

Rank: 8

Chakra Cost: 12

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 4

Perform: 10 | Perform DC: 23

Components: C, H, Mas

The user spends a full-round action to create a dense bubble. The bubble is considered a huge chakra construct and has a carrying capacity of 100 pounds of weight per level of the user. It can comfortably fit up to three medium-sized creatures provided their combined weight does not exceed the total mentioned above. The bubble remains active for as long as the user can concentrate, plus 1 round per 2 levels. While housed in the bubble, the user can manipulate it to fly over great distances with good maneuverability. It travels at a speed of 100 feet per round, or 1000 feet per minute. The bubble has a defense of 10, a hardness of 5, and hit points equal to the character 's level. If the bubble is destroyed, anyone who was previously in it begin falling.

Requires: Concentration 12 ranks

Effect: Creates a huge bubble

Mastery: Each level of mastery in this technique increases the hardness of the bubble by 1.
